home.heroSubline: 3D visualization & interior design studio based in Miami. Renders in 48–72h.
home.designQuote: "Design is not decoration — it is the language space speaks."
home.approachParagraph: Somaz Studio brings together design sensibility and cutting-edge visualization tools to transform spaces across Miami, Latin America, and beyond.
home.step01Desc: We begin with a focused conversation — understanding your vision, program, and timeline. No templates, no assumptions.
home.step02Desc: We develop the spatial concept, material palette, and visualization strategy. Every decision is intentional and documented.
home.step03Desc: Final renders, drawings, or design packages delivered on schedule. Clear, complete, ready to use.

services.heading: 3D Visualization & Design Services
services.subheading: From photorealistic renders to full interior design — tailored to your project, delivered remotely, anywhere in the world.
services.audienceLine: Trusted by real estate developers, architects, and homeowners across Miami and beyond.
services.ctaQuestion: Not sure which service fits your project?
services.ctaSubtitle: Tell us about your vision — we'll figure it out together.
services.metaDesc: Professional 3D architectural visualization, interior design, conceptual design, and design consulting. Miami-based studio delivering globally. Fast turnaround — 48 to 72 hours.
services.ogDesc: 3D visualization, interior design, conceptual design & consulting. Based in Miami, delivering globally.
services.faq1Q: How long does a 3D visualization take?
services.faq1A: Delivery depends on the package. Essential (1 view) takes 48–72 hours. Standard (3 views) takes 5–7 business days. Premium (5+ views) is scoped per project.
services.faq2Q: Do you work with clients outside Miami?
services.faq2A: Yes — we are a remote-first studio and work with clients across the US, Latin America, and internationally. All deliveries are digital.
services.faq3Q: What files do I need to provide?
services.faq3A: For 3D visualization we need floor plans (PDF or CAD) and elevation drawings if available. For interior design, detailed measurements or a site visit are also helpful.
services.faq4Q: Can I request changes after delivery?
services.faq4A: Yes. All packages include at least one round of revisions. Additional rounds can be added at an hourly rate.

about.intro: Somaz Studio was founded in Miami with a clear purpose: bring Latin American design sensibility to a global market. We specialize in 3D visualization, interior design, and spatial concept development — working remotely with clients across the US, Latin America, and beyond.
about.quote: "Design is not decoration — it is the language space speaks."
about.diff1Desc: Our design approach combines technical precision with a deep understanding of how space, culture, and light shape the experience of living.
about.diff2Desc: We handle the full creative arc: from initial spatial concept through material selection, furniture layout, and photorealistic visualization.
about.diff3Desc: Built for a borderless world. We collaborate with clients across 8+ countries using a process that is clear, fast, and location-independent.
about.metaTitle: About the Studio — 3D Visualization & Design Studio Miami
about.metaDesc: Somaz Studio is a Miami-based design studio founded in 2022 by Sofía Mazzucco. Specializing in 3D architectural visualization, interior design, and spatial concepts for clients across the US, Latin America, and the Middle East.
about.ogDesc: A Latin American perspective. A global design language. Based in Miami.

contact.metaDesc: Start a project with Somaz Studio. Based in Miami, available worldwide.

contact.responseNote: We respond within 24 hours with a personalized proposal.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.s1body: Somaz Studio LLC ("Somaz Studio", "we", "us") is a design studio based in Miami, FL, operating globally. We provide 3D visualization, interior design, conceptual design, and consulting services. You can reach us at hola@somazstudio.com.
privacy.s2intro: We collect information you provide directly when you:
privacy.s2li1: Submit our contact form (name, email, phone, project type, budget, project size, message)
privacy.s2li2: Subscribe to our newsletter (email address only)
privacy.s2outro: We also collect anonymous usage data through Vercel Analytics, which measures page views and performance metrics without identifying individual visitors.
privacy.s3li1: To respond to project inquiries and communicate about potential engagements
privacy.s3li2: To send studio updates and project reveals via newsletter (only if you subscribed)
privacy.s3li3: To improve our website and services through aggregate analytics
privacy.s3outro: We do not use your information for automated decision-making or profiling.
privacy.s4body: Your data is stored securely in Supabase (a PostgreSQL-based cloud database) hosted on AWS infrastructure in the United States. Data is protected with row-level security and encrypted at rest and in transit.
privacy.s5body: We do not sell, rent, or share your personal information with third parties for their marketing purposes. We may share data only with service providers necessary to operate our business (Supabase for storage, Resend for transactional email, Vercel for hosting and analytics), each bound by their own privacy policies.
privacy.s6intro: Depending on your location, you may have the right to:
privacy.s6li1: Access the personal information we hold about you
privacy.s6li2: Request correction or deletion of your data
privacy.s6li3: Withdraw consent for newsletter communications at any time
privacy.s6li4: Lodge a complaint with your local data protection authority (for EU residents)
privacy.s6outro: To exercise any of these rights, email us at hola@somazstudio.com.
privacy.s7body: We do not use tracking cookies or advertising cookies. Vercel Analytics uses a privacy-friendly approach that does not rely on cookies to identify visitors.
privacy.s8body: Contact form submissions are retained for up to 2 years to support ongoing business relationships. Newsletter subscriptions are retained until you unsubscribe.
privacy.s9body: We may update this policy from time to time. Material changes will be noted with an updated date at the top of this page. Continued use of our website after changes constitutes acceptance of the updated policy.
privacy.s10body: Questions about this policy? Email hola@somazstudio.com or write to: Somaz Studio LLC, Miami, FL, United States.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.metaDesc: Terms of Service for Somaz Studio.
terms.s1body: Somaz Studio LLC ("we," "us," or "the Studio") provides 3D visualization, interior design, conceptual design, and design consulting services. By engaging our services or submitting a project inquiry, you agree to these Terms of Service.
terms.s2body: Each project is governed by a separate written agreement or proposal specifying scope, deliverables, timeline, and fees. These Terms supplement — and do not replace — any project-specific agreement. In case of conflict, the project agreement controls.
terms.s3body: All designs, renderings, drawings, and creative works produced by Somaz Studio remain the intellectual property of Somaz Studio until full payment is received. Upon payment, clients receive a license to use the deliverables as specified in the project agreement. We retain the right to display completed work in our portfolio unless otherwise agreed in writing.
terms.s4body: Payment terms are specified in each project agreement. A deposit is typically required before work begins. Unpaid balances may result in work being paused or deliverables withheld until payment is received.
terms.s5body: Each proposal includes a defined number of revision rounds. Additional revisions or scope changes beyond the agreed terms will be billed at our standard hourly rate or via a change order, to be agreed upon in writing before work proceeds.
terms.s6body: Somaz Studio is not a licensed architecture or engineering firm. Our visualizations and designs are for representational and planning purposes only and are not construction documents. We are not liable for decisions made based on our work without appropriate professional review. Our total liability for any claim shall not exceed the fees paid for the specific project giving rise to the claim.
terms.s7body: We treat all client project information as confidential and will not disclose it to third parties without your consent, except as required by law.
terms.s8body: These Terms are governed by the laws of the State of Florida, United States. Any disputes shall be resolved in the courts of Miami-Dade County, Florida.
terms.s9body: Questions about these Terms? Contact us at hola@somazstudio.com.
